# External Superpowers

Place imported GitHub or third-party superpowers here.

Before using an external superpower:

- Record it in `.agent-harness/superpowers/registry.md`.
- Read `.agent-harness/superpowers/policy.md`.
- Confirm it does not override lifecycle, gates, approval, verification, tool
  policy, or project memory.

Do not install external superpowers into root-level folders unless the project
explicitly chooses that layout.
